This attempt will be judged by Britney, a

We also have Dennis, the health inspector,
to make sure that the food is handled

Dennis:
Nick and Linda, you have eight hours to

I don't make the rules.

You do make the rules, though. This is the

After chilling the donut for one hour, we

Our layers are definitely starting to add

Where we'll then add the final three layers

With the big challenge right now is that

What we're holding here are the stencils.

Lynja:

But I'll be honest, my arms are getting

This is what it takes to get a world record.

It's definitely starting to take the shape

But to finish things off, I'm kneading

The thing that I'm really scared about right

If we don't do this within that eight hour

As a reminder This is what we're going for.

And we're getting closer and closer.

And you're not going to want to miss that.
